import { inject } from "../../../core/inject.js";
import { RpgClientEngine } from "../../../RpgClientEngine.js";
import { DOMContainer, DOMElement, DOMSprite, Navigation, computed, cond, createTabindexNavigator, h, loop, signal, useDefineProps, useProps } from "canvasengine";
import { delay } from "@rpgjs/common";
//#region src/components/gui/menu/items-menu.ce
function component($$props) {
	useProps($$props);
	const defineProps = useDefineProps($$props);
	var engine = inject(RpgClientEngine);
	var keyboardControls = engine.globalConfig.keyboardControls;
	var selectedItem = signal(0);
	var selectedTab = signal(0);
	var selectedConfirm = signal(0);
	var confirmOpen = signal(false);
	var confirmItem = signal(null);
	var _a = defineProps(), data = _a.data, onInteraction = _a.onInteraction, onBack = _a.onBack;
	var items = computed(function() {
		return data().items;
	});
	var tabs = [
		{
			id: "item",
			label: "Items"
		},
		{
			id: "weapon",
			label: "Weapons"
		},
		{
			id: "armor",
			label: "Armor"
		}
	];
	var resolveProp = function(value) {
		return typeof value === "function" ? value() : value;
	};
	var safeItems = computed(function() {
		var value = resolveProp(items);
		return Array.isArray(value) ? value : [];
	});
	var filteredItems = computed(function() {
		var items = safeItems();
		var tab = tabs[selectedTab()];
		if (!tab) return [];
		return items.filter(function(item) {
			var _a;
			return item.type === tab.id && ((_a = item.quantity) !== null && _a !== void 0 ? _a : 1) > 0;
		});
	});
	var confirmOptions = [{
		id: "use",
		label: "Use"
	}, {
		id: "cancel",
		label: "Cancel"
	}];
	var nav = createTabindexNavigator(selectedItem, { count: function() {
		return filteredItems().length;
	} }, "wrap");
	var navConfirm = createTabindexNavigator(selectedConfirm, { count: function() {
		return confirmOptions.length;
	} }, "wrap");
	var currentItem = computed(function() {
		return filteredItems()[selectedItem()];
	});
	var iconSheet = function(iconId) {
		return { definition: engine.getSpriteSheet(iconId) };
	};
	var clampSelection = function() {
		var count = filteredItems().length;
		if (count === 0) {
			selectedItem.set(0);
			return;
		}
		if (selectedItem() >= count) selectedItem.set(count - 1);
	};
	function selectItem(index) {
		return function() {
			selectedItem.set(index);
			requestUseItem(index);
		};
	}
	function selectTab(index) {
		return function() {
			selectedItem.set(0);
			selectedTab.set(index);
		};
	}
	var useItem = function(index) {
		var item = filteredItems()[index];
		if (!item || !item.usable) return;
		if (onInteraction) onInteraction("useItem", { id: item.id });
	};
	var requestUseItem = function(index) {
		var item = filteredItems()[index];
		if (!item || !item.usable) return;
		if (item.consumable) {
			confirmItem.set(item);
			confirmOpen.set(true);
			selectedConfirm.set(0);
			return;
		}
		useItem(index);
	};
	var confirmUse = function() {
		var item = confirmItem();
		if (!item) return;
		delay(function() {
			if (onInteraction) onInteraction("useItem", { id: item.id });
			confirmOpen.set(false);
			confirmItem.set(null);
		});
	};
	var cancelConfirm = function() {
		delay(function() {
			confirmOpen.set(false);
			confirmItem.set(null);
		});
	};
	function confirmSelect(index) {
		return function() {
			selectedConfirm.set(index);
			if (index === 0) {
				confirmUse();
				return;
			}
			cancelConfirm();
		};
	}
	var confirmControls = signal({
		left: {
			repeat: true,
			bind: keyboardControls.left,
			throttle: 150,
			keyDown: function() {
				if (!confirmOpen()) return;
				navConfirm.next(-1);
			}
		},
		right: {
			repeat: true,
			bind: keyboardControls.right,
			throttle: 150,
			keyDown: function() {
				if (!confirmOpen()) return;
				navConfirm.next(1);
			}
		},
		action: {
			bind: keyboardControls.action,
			keyDown: function() {
				if (!confirmOpen()) return;
				confirmSelect(selectedConfirm())();
			}
		},
		escape: {
			bind: keyboardControls.escape,
			keyDown: function() {
				if (!confirmOpen()) return;
				cancelConfirm();
			}
		}
	});
	var controls = signal({
		up: {
			repeat: true,
			bind: keyboardControls.up,
			throttle: 150,
			keyDown: function() {
				if (confirmOpen()) return;
				nav.next(-1);
			}
		},
		left: {
			repeat: true,
			bind: keyboardControls.left,
			throttle: 150,
			keyDown: function() {
				if (confirmOpen()) return;
				selectedTab.update(function(value) {
					return (value - 1 + tabs.length) % tabs.length;
				});
				selectedItem.set(0);
			}
		},
		right: {
			repeat: true,
			bind: keyboardControls.right,
			throttle: 150,
			keyDown: function() {
				if (confirmOpen()) return;
				selectedTab.update(function(value) {
					return (value + 1) % tabs.length;
				});
				selectedItem.set(0);
			}
		},
		down: {
			repeat: true,
			bind: keyboardControls.down,
			throttle: 150,
			keyDown: function() {
				if (confirmOpen()) return;
				nav.next(1);
			}
		},
		action: {
			bind: keyboardControls.action,
			keyDown: function() {
				if (confirmOpen()) {
					confirmSelect(selectedConfirm())();
					return;
				}
				requestUseItem(selectedItem());
			}
		},
		escape: {
			bind: keyboardControls.escape,
			keyDown: function() {
				if (confirmOpen()) {
					cancelConfirm();
					return;
				}
				if (onBack) onBack();
			}
		},
		gamepad: { enabled: true }
	});
	clampSelection();
	return h(DOMContainer, {
		width: "100%",
		height: "100%"
	}, h(DOMElement, {
		element: "div",
		attrs: { class: "rpg-ui-menu-panel rpg-ui-panel" }
	}, [
		h(DOMElement, {
			element: "div",
			attrs: { class: "rpg-ui-menu-panel-header" },
			textContent: "Items"
		}),
		h(DOMElement, {
			element: "div",
			attrs: { class: "rpg-ui-menu-panel-body rpg-ui-menu-panel-body-stacked" }
		}, [h(DOMElement, { element: "div" }, cond(currentItem, () => h(DOMElement, {
			element: "div",
			attrs: { class: "rpg-ui-menu-panel-details rpg-ui-panel" }
		}, h(DOMElement, {
			element: "div",
			attrs: { class: "rpg-ui-menu-panel-hero" }
		}, [h(DOMElement, {
			element: "div",
			attrs: { class: "rpg-ui-menu-panel-hero-icon" }
		}, h(DOMSprite, {
			sheet: computed(() => iconSheet(currentItem()?.icon)),
			playing: "default",
			width: "48px",
			height: "48px",
			objectFit: "contain"
		})), h(DOMElement, { element: "div" }, [h(DOMElement, {
			element: "div",
			attrs: { class: "rpg-ui-menu-panel-details-title" },
			textContent: computed(() => currentItem()?.name)
		}), h(DOMElement, {
			element: "div",
			attrs: { class: "rpg-ui-menu-panel-details-desc" },
			textContent: computed(() => currentItem()?.description || "")
		})])])))), h(DOMElement, {
			element: "div",
			attrs: { class: "rpg-ui-menu-panel-list rpg-ui-menu rpg-ui-menu-panel-list-full" }
		}, [h(DOMElement, {
			element: "div",
			attrs: { class: "rpg-ui-menu-tabs" }
		}, loop(tabs, (tab, tabIndex) => h(DOMElement, {
			element: "div",
			attrs: {
				class: ["rpg-ui-menu-tab", computed(() => ({ active: selectedTab() === tabIndex }))],
				tabindex: tabIndex,
				click: selectTab(tabIndex)
			},
			textContent: tab.label
		}))), h(Navigation, {
			tabindex: selectedItem,
			controls
		}, loop(filteredItems, (item, index) => h(DOMElement, {
			element: "div",
			attrs: {
				class: ["rpg-ui-menu-item rpg-ui-menu-row", { disabled: !item.usable }],
				"data-selected": computed(() => selectedItem() === index ? "true" : "false"),
				tabindex: index,
				click: selectItem(index)
			}
		}, [h(DOMElement, {
			element: "div",
			attrs: { class: "rpg-ui-menu-row-main" }
		}, [h(DOMElement, {
			element: "div",
			attrs: { class: "rpg-ui-menu-row-icon" }
		}, h(DOMSprite, {
			sheet: computed(() => iconSheet(item.icon)),
			playing: "default",
			width: "28px",
			height: "28px",
			objectFit: "contain"
		})), h(DOMElement, {
			element: "span",
			textContent: item.name
		})]), h(DOMElement, {
			element: "span",
			attrs: { class: "rpg-ui-menu-row-end" },
			textContent: "x" + item.quantity
		})])))])]),
		cond(confirmOpen, () => h(DOMElement, {
			element: "div",
			attrs: { class: "rpg-ui-menu-confirm" }
		}, h(DOMElement, {
			element: "div",
			attrs: { class: "rpg-ui-menu-confirm-card" }
		}, [h(DOMElement, {
			element: "div",
			attrs: { class: "rpg-ui-menu-confirm-title" },
			textContent: computed(() => "Use " + confirmItem()?.name + "?")
		}), h(Navigation, {
			tabindex: selectedConfirm,
			controls: confirmControls
		}, h(DOMElement, {
			element: "div",
			attrs: { class: "rpg-ui-menu-confirm-actions" }
		}, loop(confirmOptions, (option, index) => h(DOMElement, {
			element: "button",
			attrs: {
				class: ["rpg-ui-menu-confirm-btn", { "rpg-ui-menu-confirm-btn-secondary": option.id === "cancel" }],
				"data-selected": computed(() => selectedConfirm() === index ? "true" : "false"),
				tabindex: index,
				click: confirmSelect(index)
			},
			textContent: option.label
		}))))])))
	]));
}
//#endregion
export { component as default };

//# sourceMappingURL=items-menu.ce.js.map
